scripts.reset-password: node -e "const fs=require('fs');try{const d=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('krmu_data.json'));if(!d.settings)d.settings={};d.settings.managerPassword='krmu@admin';fs.writeFileSync('krmu_data.json',JSON.stringify(d,null,2));console.log('✅ Password reset to: krmu@admin');}catch(e){console.error('❌ Error:',e.message);}"
